chapter1.title: Technology Transfer & Local Foundation
chapter1.desc: Starting with semiconductor optoelectronics technology, breaking through local market technical barriers, and promoting laboratory achievements to industrialization

chapter2.title: Technology Breakthrough & Industry Leadership
chapter2.desc: Established four-level R&D system, accumulated five core technologies, evolving from domestic standard participant to international standard maker

chapter3.title: IPO & Globalization Upgrade
chapter3.desc: Listed on Shenzhen Stock Exchange GEM in 2017, building China HQ + SE Asia Manufacturing + Global Sales operation system

chapter4.title: Strategic Focus & Future Development
chapter4.desc: Deepening Globalization 3.0 strategy, tackling key technologies for national needs, providing GOPRO solutions for the AI era
